criteria_results.evidence: database.ts: RunbookStatus (line 277), RunbookStepStatus (line 278), ActivityAction (line 310), ActivityLog interface (line 312), CriteriaType (line 329), ColoringRule interface (line 331). All 6 confirmed.

criteria_results.evidence: workspace-context.tsx: useWorkspace (line 24), WorkspaceProvider (line 41). Both exported.

criteria_results.criterion: Migration 018 defines clone_workspace SECURITY DEFINER function
criteria_results.evidence: 018_clone_workspace.sql:12-249: `CREATE OR REPLACE FUNCTION clone_workspace(p_source_workspace_id UUID) RETURNS JSONB ... LANGUAGE plpgsql SECURITY DEFINER`. NOTE: spec stated signature as (p_workspace_id, p_user_id, p_org_id) but actual is (p_source_workspace_id) only — user_id from auth.uid(), org_id from workspace record. Code is correct and more secure; spec was inaccurate.

criteria_results.criterion: clone_workspace copies 13 tables with UUID remapping via temp tables
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 018 copies all 13 tables in FK order: workspace, tabs, sections, steps, connections, teams, roles, people, tools, step_roles, stages, touchpoints, touchpoint_connections. 7 ON COMMIT DROP temp tables for UUID remapping: _cwt_tab, _cwt_section, _cwt_step, _cwt_team, _cwt_role, _cwt_stage, _cwt_touchpoint.

criteria_results.criterion: clone_workspace does NOT copy: perspectives, annotations, comments, tasks, runbooks, activity_log, coloring_rules
criteria_results.evidence: Migration 018 header comment (lines 7-9) explicitly lists excluded tables. No INSERT statements for these tables found in function body.

criteria_results.evidence: src/app/api/v1/workspaces/[id]/clone/route.ts exists. Lines 12-16: auth check `if (!user) return errorResponse('unauthorized', 'Not authenticated', 401)`.

criteria_results.criterion: Clone route calls supabase.rpc('clone_workspace') with workspace_id, user_id, org_id
criteria_results.evidence: clone/route.ts:18-20: `supabase.rpc('clone_workspace', { p_source_workspace_id: id })`. Matches actual migration signature (1 param, not 3 as spec stated).

criteria_results.criterion: Clone route returns new workspace data via successResponse envelope
criteria_results.evidence: clone/route.ts:54: `return successResponse(workspace)` where workspace is freshly fetched from DB after clone.

criteria_results.evidence: clone/route.ts:43-52: `void logActivity({ supabase, workspace_id: newWorkspaceId, user_id: user.id, action: 'created', entity_type: 'workspaces', ..., details: { cloned_from: id } })`.

criteria_results.evidence: client.ts:65-67: `export async function cloneWorkspace(id: string): Promise<Workspace> { return apiFetch<Workspace>('/api/v1/workspaces/${id}/clone', { method: 'POST' }); }`

criteria_results.evidence: coloring-rules/route.ts: GET (workspace_id param, ordered by position) + POST (full validation). coloring-rules/[id]/route.ts: PATCH (EDITABLE_FIELDS whitelist + validation) + DELETE. Both files fully verified.

criteria_results.evidence: coloring-rules/route.ts:8 and coloring-rules/[id]/route.ts:6 both define `HEX_COLOR_REGEX = /^#[0-9A-Fa-f]{6}$/i`. POST validates at line 60; PATCH validates at line 35.

criteria_results.evidence: coloring-rules/[id]/route.ts:7: `VALID_CRITERIA_TYPES = ['status', 'executor', 'step_type', 'has_role', 'maturity_below', 'maturity_above'] as const`. Lines 39-47: validates updates.criteria_type against this array.

criteria_results.criterion: ColoringTintContext defined in canvas.ts
criteria_results.evidence: canvas.ts:17: `export const ColoringTintContext = createContext<Map<string, string>>(new Map())`.

criteria_results.criterion: canvas-view.tsx fetches rules, evaluates in position order (last match wins), provides tint map via context
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx:162-218: fetchColoringRules on mount (useEffect), useMemo computes Map<stepId, color> — iterates active rules per step with `map.set(step.id, rule.color)` overwriting (last match wins). Rules returned in position ASC order from API. Wrapped in `<ColoringTintContext.Provider value={coloringTints}>`.

criteria_results.criterion: step-node.tsx consumes ColoringTintContext, applies 15% opacity background (hex alpha 26)
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx:35-36: reads ColoringTintContext. Line 53: `backgroundColor: \`${coloringTint}26\`` — hex 0x26 = 38/255 ≈ 14.9% opacity ≈ 15%. Exact match to criterion.

criteria_results.criterion: Heat map precedence: coloring tint suppressed when heat map active
criteria_results.evidence: step-node.tsx:50-54: style ternary evaluates `heatMapMode && maturityColor` first (line 50), then `coloringTint` (line 52), then default var. Heat map always takes precedence over coloring tint.

criteria_results.criterion: coloring-panel.tsx accessible via paintbrush button (absolute overlay z-10)
criteria_results.evidence: canvas-view.tsx:249: `<div className='absolute top-2.5 right-2.5 z-10 flex flex-col items-end gap-1'>`. Lines 250-263: toggle button with `<Paintbrush className='h-3.5 w-3.5' />` and aria-label='Toggle coloring rules'.

criteria_results.evidence: Grep for ColoringTintContext/coloringRules/fetchColoringRules in journey-canvas-view.tsx returned 0 matches. Coloring system is exclusively in canvas-view.tsx (process canvas).

criteria_results.evidence: activity/page.tsx:25: `.select('*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)')`. Exact FK hint confirmed.

criteria_results.evidence: api/v1/activity/route.ts:32: `.select('*, users!activity_log_user_id_fkey(email)')`. Identical string — parity confirmed.

criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx:176: `{entry.users?.email ?? 'Unknown'}`. Uses optional chaining — the ?? 'Unknown' fallback only triggers for rows with null user_id. Valid entries show actual email.

criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx:147: exact string confirmed in empty state block (when activeFilter === 'all' and filtered.length === 0).

criteria_results.criterion: Load More re-fetches from API with same joined select shape
criteria_results.evidence: activity-view.tsx:84: `fetchActivityLog(workspaceId, { limit: 50, offset: entries.length })` → client.ts:675: routes to `/api/v1/activity?...` → route.ts:32: same joined select. Full chain consistent.

quality_gate.note: Playwright unavailable per EXECUTION_PLAN testing_plan method field. All checks via source code static analysis. Console/network counts reflect no code-level error sources found.

bugs_found.description: The 'has_role' criteria type in coloring rules is silently skipped during visual tint evaluation in canvas-view.tsx. A rule with criteria_type='has_role' can be created, saved, and appears in the panel, but produces no tint on any step. The switch statement comment reads '// Requires additional data fetch — skip visual evaluation for now'. Users have no indication this option is non-functional.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Open coloring panel (paintbrush button on canvas). 2. Create a rule with criteria_type = 'has_role'. 3. Assign a role to a step via the step detail panel. 4. Observe: step receives no background tint. No error or warning displayed.

bugs_found.page: EXECUTION_PLAN spec — not a runtime bug
bugs_found.description: EXECUTION_PLAN acceptance check #1 for FEAT-050 states the function signature as `clone_workspace(p_workspace_id, p_user_id, p_org_id)` but the actual migration 018 defines `clone_workspace(p_source_workspace_id UUID)` (1 parameter only). The API route correctly calls with `{ p_source_workspace_id: id }`. The code is correct; the spec documentation was inaccurate.
bugs_found.steps_to_reproduce: 1. Read EXECUTION_PLAN.json acceptance_FEAT-050 check #1. 2. Read supabase/migrations/018_clone_workspace.sql function signature. 3. Note mismatch.

improvements_found.observation: The 'has_role' criteria type option is selectable in coloring-panel.tsx but silently produces no visual effect. No tooltip or disabled state communicates this to users. This causes silent confusion — a rule appears to save successfully but nothing changes on the canvas.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H1: Visibility of system status — the system must always keep users informed about what is going on
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Either (a) disable has_role option with tooltip 'Role matching not yet available visually', or (b) implement role evaluation by passing step_roles data into canvas-view.tsx's coloringTints useMemo.

improvements_found.observation: Both Duplicate Workspace (settings/page.tsx:134) and Delete Workspace (line 148) use native `window.confirm()` dialogs. This is inconsistent with the rest of the app's Radix Dialog pattern used in runbook-view.tsx. Native confirm() cannot be styled and breaks the dark-theme experience.
improvements_found.design_principle: Nielsen H4: Consistency and standards — same interaction pattern for all destructive-action confirmations
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Replace confirm() calls with Radix AlertDialog components matching the confirmCompleteOpen/confirmCancelOpen pattern in runbook-view.tsx.

improvements_found.observation: Per EXECUTION_PLAN warnings, accessibility cadence is 76 iterations overdue (last audit: iter 21, current: iter 97). Features added since then — coloring panel, runbook playbook overlay, activity filter tabs, perspective color picker — have never had a formal WCAG audit.
improvements_found.design_principle: WCAG 2.1 AA: keyboard navigation, focus management, color contrast, screen reader support
improvements_found.suggested_approach: Schedule a dedicated accessibility iteration targeting: (1) coloring panel keyboard navigation for color/type inputs, (2) playbook mode focus trap (fixed overlay should trap focus), (3) activity filter tab keyboard focus behavior, (4) color contrast check for coloring tints at 15% opacity.

regression_baseline.notes: Full baseline passes. Key verifications: null guards in buildNodes/buildEdges, auth middleware, 8-item sidebar nav, all 6 required type exports, runbook 4-state flow, Playbook button outside readOnly guard, playbook z-50 overlay.

acceptance_FEAT-050.notes: All checks pass. Implementation is coherent: migration + RPC route + client wrapper + settings UI. One spec inaccuracy documented (wrong function signature in EXECUTION_PLAN) — code is correct.

verify_FEAT-051.notes: All re-verification checks pass. Coloring tint uses hex alpha 26 (15%), heat map precedence correct, panel confined to process canvas only, coloring-panel.tsx is 347 lines.

verify_BUG-019.notes: All checks pass. FK join select shape is identical between page.tsx and route.ts. Load More chain verified end-to-end through client → API route. Empty state text exact match confirmed.
